description: Detects C-style casts in C++ -- prefer static_cast/dynamic_cast/const_cast/reinterpret_cast. Simplified from Rust: flags all cast_expression nodes uniformly (warning severity) without distinguishing pointer casts (error) vs numeric casts (info) vs void casts (skip). NOLINT suppression and macro-context detection are not supported in the JSON DSL.

flag.message: C-style cast detected -- use static_cast<>, dynamic_cast<>, const_cast<>, or reinterpret_cast<> instead
